'''tongayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocoderlike|vocoderlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocoderlike|vocoderlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tongayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tongayithi|tongayithi]] || [[word:tongayiji|tongayiji]] || [[word:tongayishi|tongayishi]] || [[word:tongayiki|tongayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tongayuthuthu|tongayuthuthu]] || [[word:tongayujuju|tongayujuju]] || [[word:tongayushushu|tongayushushu]] || [[word:tongayukuku|tongayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tongayuthu|tongayuthu]] || [[word:tongayuju|tongayuju]] || [[word:tongayushu|tongayushu]] || [[word:tongayuku|tongayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tongayufthuf|tongayufthuf]] || [[word:tongayufjuf|tongayufjuf]] || [[word:tongayufshuf|tongayufshuf]] || [[word:tongayufkuf|tongayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tongayethe|tongayethe]] || [[word:tongayeje|tongayeje]] || [[word:tongayeshe|tongayeshe]] || [[word:tongayeke|tongayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tongayothotho|tongayothotho]] || [[word:tongayojojo|tongayojojo]] || [[word:tongayoshosho|tongayoshosho]] || [[word:tongayokoko|tongayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tongayotho|tongayotho]] || [[word:tongayojo|tongayojo]] || [[word:tongayosho|tongayosho]] || [[word:tongayoko|tongayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tongayofthof|tongayofthof]] || [[word:tongayofjof|tongayofjof]] || [[word:tongayofshof|tongayofshof]] || [[word:tongayofkof|tongayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tongayïfthïf|tongayïfthïf]] || [[word:tongayïfjïf|tongayïfjïf]] || [[word:tongayïfshïf|tongayïfshïf]] || [[word:tongayïfkïf|tongayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tongayïfthïfthïf|tongayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:tongayïfjïfjïf|tongayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:tongayïfshïfshïf|tongayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:tongayïfkïfkïf|tongayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tongayïfthïf|tongayïfthïf]] || [[word:tongayïfjïf|tongayïfjïf]] || [[word:tongayïfshïf|tongayïfshïf]] || [[word:tongayïfkïf|tongayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tongayïfthïf|tongayïfthïf]] || [[word:tongayïfjïf|tongayïfjïf]] || [[word:tongayïfshïf|tongayïfshïf]] || [[word:tongayïfkïf|tongayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tongayæthæ|tongayæthæ]] || [[word:tongayæjæ|tongayæjæ]] || [[word:tongayæshæ|tongayæshæ]] || [[word:tongayækæ|tongayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tongayathatha|tongayathatha]] || [[word:tongayajaja|tongayajaja]] || [[word:tongayashasha|tongayashasha]] || [[word:tongayakaka|tongayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tongayatha|tongayatha]] || [[word:tongayaja|tongayaja]] || [[word:tongayasha|tongayasha]] || [[word:tongayaka|tongayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tongayafthaf|tongayafthaf]] || [[word:tongayafjaf|tongayafjaf]] || [[word:tongayafshaf|tongayafshaf]] || [[word:tongayafkaf|tongayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tongayasha|tongayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tongayshësha|tongayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tongayrosha|tongayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tongaymusha|tongaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tongayasha|tongayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotongaynkshësha|gotongaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotongaynkrosha|gotongaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotongaynkmusha|gotongaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotongaynkyasha|gotongaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tongangayasha|tongangayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tongangayshësha|tongangayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tongangayrosha|tongangayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tongangaymusha|tongangaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tongangayasha|tongangayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotongangaynkshësha|gotongangaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotongangaynkrosha|gotongangaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotongangaynkmusha|gotongangaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotongangaynkyasha|gotongangaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tengæyasha|tengæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tengæyshësha|tengæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tengæyrosha|tengæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tengæymusha|tengæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tengæyasha|tengæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotengæynkshësha|gotengæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotengæynkrosha|gotengæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotengæynkmusha|gotengæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotengæynkyasha|gotengæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tongfayasha|tongfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tongfayshësha|tongfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tongfayrosha|tongfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tongfaymusha|tongfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tongfayasha|tongfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotongfaynkshësha|gotongfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotongfaynkrosha|gotongfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotongfaynkmusha|gotongfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotongfaynkyasha|gotongfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
